<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers can evaluate your change efficiently.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? One or two short paragraphs. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". Write "None" if this is unrelated. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run checks` locally and it passed
- [ ] I added or updated tests as needed
- [ ] I updated documentation (README, architecture docs) if behavior changed
- [ ] My commits follow the Conventional Commits format (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I preserved the Fail-open behavior of the hook

## Notes for Reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to, or known limitations. -->
